FRAME-JOIN HANDOFF (LOOP): Matches Frame 1 exactly — hand over throttle, calm direct gaze, corridor framing — so the reel loops back to Frame 1 with no visible seam.

NEGATIVE: No real logos/readable plates, no extra fingers, no second face, no immodest fit, no warped anatomy, no visible loop seam.

### Frame 6 of 6 — VIDEO PROMPT (LOOP)

IDENTITY & CHARACTER-CONSISTENCY LOCK: render Aira strictly from the locked identity reference and hold her the SAME PERSON for the entire 6-second clip and every generated frame. Treat identity as a FIXED skeleton that never changes — bone structure (skull, cheekbones, jawline, chin), overall face shape and proportions, eye shape, spacing and iris colour, nose and lip shape, skin tone and real skin texture (visible pores, fine peach-fuzz; no plastic smoothing, no beautification creep, no face re-shaping), hairline, hair colour and texture, height, build and hand/finger anatomy. ONLY the soft expression muscles may move — eyelids, brows, cheeks and mouth corners — together with the eyes, gaze and head; expression and lip-sync animate ON TOP of that fixed identity and must NEVER alter the face shape, the eye colour, or who she is. Keep expression changes smooth and moderate and lead them with the EYES and GAZE (soft smiles, brow lifts, a parted breath, eyes tracing the object) — no extreme grimace, no wide-mouth distortion, no hard squint, no rapid expression flicker that would warp the geometry; favour one clean expression transition per clip. ABSOLUTE ZERO identity drift: no morphing, melting, smearing, rubbery warping, face-swapping, twinning or a second/duplicate subject, no age, weight, ethnicity or gender shift, no extra, missing or fused fingers or limbs. Identity stays identical at the first frame, every in-between frame, the loop seam and the last frame. Through any transform, impossible move or fast action ONLY the intended element (wardrobe, environment, props or effect) changes — her face, identity and proportions stay fully recognizable; interpolate strictly between the locked keyframes and never invent a new face, new hands, extra limbs or a second subject. Do not mirror, flip or invert the frame.

SHOT TYPE: Loop-close establishing; subject ~50% as the drone rises.

DRONE / RIG NOTE: Cinema drone pull-up (hero level → high over gridlock), the mirror of Frame 1's descent.

CAMERA MOVEMENT: The drone rises and pulls back to the Frame 1 establishing position; one smooth move, no jitter.

LENS: 35mm-equiv, f/2.0.

SUBJECT ACTION — MICRO-TIMECODE:

`00:13.6–00:14.6` she settles back at the head of the grid, hand loose over the throttle, the composed quarter-smile returning

`00:14.6–00:15.8` a held breath as the drone rises over the corridor

`00:15.8–00:16.8` the framing matches Frame 1 exactly, ready to loop

PHYSICS & MOTION: Real drifting haze and wet reflections shifting with the drone parallax, natural strand movement — matched to Frame 1.

LIGHTING: Warm tail-light key, cool sky-bounce, electric-blue rim — matched to Frame 1.

ENVIRONMENT: The city expressway at blue hour, gridlocked traffic, neon billboards, wet tarmac.

SPEED RAMP: 100% real-time.

AUDIO (diegetic + master-track button): the low city room-tone, distant horns and idling bed return (the Frame 1 bed); `00:14.0` a soft glove-creak as she resets; `00:14.6` her slow centering exhale (no word). Master-track resolves on a sustained cool chord so the reel loops with no audible seam. No words from Aira.

DURATION: 6.0s (running total 00:16.8 active; ~23s with handles).

FRAME RATE + MOTION BLUR: 24fps, 180° shutter, natural blur on the drone rise; real-time.

LIP-SYNC: None — lips composed.

FRAME-JOIN HANDOFF (LOOP): Resolves to the exact Frame 1 hook (hand over throttle, direct gaze, drone high) so Frame 6 → Frame 1 loops invisibly.

NEGATIVE: No Aira speaking, no real logos/plates, no stutter-cut, no warped anatomy, no visible loop seam, identity flicker.

---

🎚️ MASTER TRACK BRIEF — Concept 07 (Lane Split): A cool, surgical electronic-cinematic score built around forward propulsion. Opens low and tense under the head-of-the-grid hook (Frame 1) with a deep sub-pulse, a ticking hi-hat and a single cold synth-drone; a driving arpeggio and a tight kick enter on the roll-on (Frame 2); the dematerialize beats (Frames 3–4) are scored with crystalline glassy particle-chimes layered over the exhaust surge, building to a soaring PEAK swell as the whole lane streams to light; the track ducks cleanly under the narrator VO at the open-road emerge (Frame 5 — "Everyone sees a wall... she sees the gap."); then it resolves to a sustained cool chord as she settles back at the grid (Frame 6) for a seamless loop. Tempo driving around 110–116 BPM, minor and electric with a bright neon top. Kept under the diegetic engine, wind, tyre and particle-shimmer SFX — electric and present, never a full mix. (Distinct from every other Master Track Brief in this set.)

## 🪂 CONCEPT 08 — BASE JUMP · The wingsuit ignites into blazing wings of phoenix-light

Pillar / Format: Aerial Hero / VO · 9:16 vertical reel · VEO 3.1 (motion) + Nano Banana Pro (stills)

Hero: Aira in an aerodynamic wingsuit leaping from a towering granite peak; self-aware, fluid, fully human flyer — fearless serenity with breath-true micro-expressions, total control in free-flight

Setting: A colossal granite spire at golden sunrise above a sea of clouds — a vast valley far below, distant snow peaks, warm sun cresting the horizon casting long god-rays through the cloud-sea

Wardrobe (AW): A fitted aerodynamic wingsuit — matte-charcoal with molten-amber arm-and-leg membranes, high modest collar, full-coverage, sealed seams, nothing loose to flutter dangerously

Hair (AP): A sleek low braid tucked into the suit collar, a clean center part, a few face-framing strands free at the visor edge; color locked

Makeup (AQ): Clean kinetic glow — neutral satin skin, soft contour, defined brow, a warm coral stained lip, inner-corner brighten; real pores

Footwear: Aerodynamic black jump-boots with amber lace-flash and reinforced ankle, buckles tight, laces tucked

Accessories: A clear-shield aerodynamic helmet (visor up for identity), a low-profile altimeter on the wrist, a sealed chest-rig (non-speaking comms); nothing dangling

The Impossible Move: As her wingsuit membranes catch the air, they ignite into blazing wings of phoenix-light — the fabric becoming sweeping arcs of living amber-gold fire and feather-light that trail glowing plumes as she soars, then settle back to ordinary suit-membrane for the flare. (START keyframe = Frame 3 — membranes catch air, first phoenix-light kindling at the wing edges; PEAK = Frame 4 — full blazing phoenix-wings soaring; END keyframe = Frame 6 — wings settle back to membrane as she flares.)

Concept Line / Twist payoff: "The fall only frightens those who never learned they had wings."

Duration · frames: ~27s · 7 frames

Mood: Sublime, fearless, soaring-calm

Composition signature: Vast vertical scale — a lone figure against an infinite cloud-sea, the only fire the phoenix-wings against cool dawn blue

Camera Language: High orbiting drone on the peak → vertigo top-down on the leap → chase-drone on the deploy → FPV wing-to-wing through the soar → wide crane on the canyon bank → tracking flare on the level-out → mirror drone climb to loop

Grade / Color Script: Sublime dawn — cool blue cloud-sea, warm gold sunrise, molten-amber phoenix accent, deep uncrushed shadow, full saturated mid-tone; the phoenix beat blazing amber-gold against cool sky, glowing plumes trailing

Narrator VO (AR): One line, landed near Frame 6, warm natural Indian-accented female narrator (NOT Aira's mouth, never subject-speaking)

Frame-Join Continuity: Each frame's exit pose/cue = next frame's entry; the phoenix-ignition runs continuously across Frames 3→6 (kindle → blaze → trail → settle) so the flight reads as one unbroken motion; Frame 7 mirrors Frame 1 for a seamless loop

Identity safety: Same Aira face/proportions every frame; modest sealed wingsuit; adult, body-safe; the phoenix-light is abstract living fire, no real logos/readable text

---

### Frame 1 of 7 — IMAGE PROMPT

IDENTITY LOCK: Aira [paste identity-lock reference sheet here].

WARDROBE: The matte-charcoal wingsuit with molten-amber membranes and high modest collar, one warm gold sun-rim along the shoulder, pristine, sealed, zero snags.

HAIR: The sleek low braid tucked into the collar, a few face-framing strands free at the visor edge, razor-clean hairline, color locked.

MAKEUP: Clean kinetic glow — neutral satin skin, soft contour, defined brow, warm coral stained lip with one wet light-point, inner-corner brighten; real pores.

FOOTWEAR & ACCESSORIES: Aerodynamic jump-boots with amber lace-flash gripping the granite edge; wrist altimeter catching a tiny gold glint; sealed chest-rig; clear-shield helmet visor up.

HANDS & NAILS: Both hands loose and ready at her sides, fingertips light, no white-knuckle tension; natural posture, poised to spread the wings; short clean natural nails.

FACIAL MICRO-DYNAMICS: Chin level, a calm fearless quarter-smile pulling the left corner a hair tighter, lips parted barely 1mm on a slow centering breath, eyes direct to the horizon with a warm sun catchlight, the faintest serene focus at the outer brow.

BIOMECHANICS & WEIGHT: Standing at the very lip of the granite spire, toes to the edge, torso tall with a slight forward readiness, weight balanced through both feet, shoulders settled and squared to the drop, spine long (living stillness).

PHYSICS (animated next): The cloud-sea drifting far below, god-rays sweeping slow through the dawn, a high-altitude breeze tugging the free strands, the amber membranes catching the first sun — environment alive, flyer poised.

KINETIC STILLNESS (8 layers): 1) a free strand whipping at her temple in the high wind 2) the cloud-sea drifting slow below the edge 3) god-rays sweeping through the dawn haze 4) the amber membranes shimmering with first sun 5) chest rising on a slow centering inhale 6) a gold specular sliding along the suit seam 7) the suit catching a micro rim-shift as she breathes 8) a slow eyelash settle completing a blink.

SPATIAL LOGIC: FG = the granite edge and her boots nearest lens at ~20% depth, tack sharp; MG = Aira at the lip, the hero; BG = the infinite cloud-sea, distant peaks and cresting sun, clean separation, immense scale.

CAMERA ANGLE: A slow high orbiting DRONE easing a quarter-turn around her from high-side, revealing the spire's dizzying height and the cloud-sea — establishing the vast scale before settling on her.

LIGHTING: KEY = warm gold sunrise raking from camera-right; FILL = cool sky-bounce off the cloud-sea lifting the under-jaw; RIM = molten-amber membrane-glow kissing her shoulder; PRACTICAL = the cresting sun and god-rays; SEPARATION = the cloud-sea pulled deep so she reads ~2 stops up; BOUNCE = a soft cloud-light kick on the suit.

FRAMING: 9:16, Aira centered lower-third, vast cloud-sea headroom above, the granite edge in the lower frame, immense negative space to receive the leap.
SUBJECT FRAMING & POSITION: An establishing-to-hero framing holds Aira, centered lower-third, vast cloud-sea headroom above, the granite edge in the lower frame, immense negative space to receive the leap. She is standing at the very lip of the granite spire, toes to the edge, torso tall with a slight forward readiness, weight balanced through both feet, shoulders settled and squared to the drop, spine long. The camera holds a mid distance, Aira the sharp central figure of the Base Jump beat, with the action arcing the upper frame above her. She faces front to the lens. Her pose reads as standing at the very lip of the granite spire, toes to the edge, torso tall with a slight forward readiness, weight balanced through both feet, shoulders settled and squared to the drop, spine long (living stillness) — gaze fixed and precise on her next point, focused; head level and still for balance; both shoulders open and level, micro-adjusting; the RIGHT arm extended for counter-balance while the LEFT arm reaches out to steady the line; torso tall and poised over the narrow base, core engaged; waist long, hips stacked precisely over the support; the RIGHT support leg bearing the weight with a soft knee while the LEFT extends to balance; both feet precise on the narrow footing, weight pinpoint and controlled; hair settling with the held poise. ORIENTATION LOCK — preserve this exact left-to-right composition; do not mirror, flip or invert the frame.

LENS + DOF + BOKEH: 35mm-equiv, f/2.0, shallow — the cloud-sea melting to creamy dawn bokeh, Aira tack-sharp.

COMPOSITION REFERENCE: A sublime aerial hero still — flyer at the edge of the world, infinite cloud-sea, scroll-stopping.

ATMOSPHERE: Sublime, vast, charged — the hush of a held breath at the edge of everything.

COLOR GRADE: Sublime dawn — cool blue cloud-sea, warm gold sunrise, molten-amber accent, deep uncrushed shadow, full mid-tone, no murk.

TEXTURE & MICRO-DETAIL: The wingsuit reads as real aerodynamic membrane, the granite shows true crystalline grain, helmet shell reads real, soft peach-fuzz catches the rim at her jaw, the cloud-sea drifts authentically.

FRAME-JOIN HANDOFF: Ends locked on her hands ready at her sides and the calm horizon gaze — Frame 2 opens on those hands spreading as she leans into the leap.

NEGATIVE: No real logos/readable text, no extra fingers, no second face, no immodest fit, no warped anatomy, no floating shadows, plastic skin, oversharpened, watermarks.

Treat identity as a FIXED skeleton that never changes — bone structure (skull, cheekbones, jawline, chin), overall face shape and proportions, eye shape, spacing and iris colour, nose and lip shape, skin tone and real skin texture (visible pores, fine peach-fuzz; no plastic smoothing, no beautification creep, no face re-shaping), hairline, hair colour and texture, height, build and hand/finger anatomy. Keep expression changes smooth and moderate and lead them with the EYES and GAZE (soft smiles, brow lifts, a parted breath, eyes tracing the object) — no extreme grimace, no wide-mouth distortion, no hard squint, no rapid expression flicker that would warp the geometry; favour one clean expression transition per clip. Identity stays identical at the first frame, every in-between frame, the loop seam and the last frame. Do not mirror, flip or invert the frame.

IDENTITY LOCK: Aira [paste identity-lock reference sheet here]. WARDROBE: The wingsuit reading clean as the framing returns to the peak, collar settled, one warm gold sun-rim along the shoulder, modest, sealed — matched to Frame 1.

HAIR: The sleek low braid tucked with a few face-framing strands, color locked — matched to Frame 1.

MAKEUP: Kinetic glow carried forward — neutral satin skin, coral lip with a wet point, soft contour, real pores.

FOOTWEAR & ACCESSORIES: Jump-boots back at the granite edge, amber lace-flash; wrist altimeter; chest-rig; helmet visor up — matched to Frame 1.

HANDS & NAILS: Both hands loose and ready at her sides exactly as in Frame 1, fingertips light, no tension; short clean natural nails.

FACIAL MICRO-DYNAMICS: The smile eased back to the composed fearless quarter-smile of Frame 1, chin level, eyes direct to the horizon with a warm sun catchlight, a held soft breath.

KINETIC STILLNESS (8 layers): 1) a free strand whipping at her temple 2) the cloud-sea drifting below 3) god-rays sweeping through the dawn 4) the amber membranes shimmering with sun 5) chest on a slow centering inhale 6) a gold specular on the suit seam 7) the suit catching a micro rim-shift 8) a slow eyelash settle — all matched to Frame 1.

CAMERA ANGLE: A mirror drone climb rising from hero level to high-side over the spire — the inverse of Frame 1's orbit-descent, closing the loop.

LIGHTING: KEY warm gold sunrise; FILL cool sky-bounce; RIM molten-amber membrane-glow; PRACTICAL the sun and god-rays; SEPARATION cloud-sea deep; BOUNCE soft cloud-light — all matched to Frame 1.

FRAMING: 9:16, Aira lower-third, cloud-sea headroom, granite edge in the lower frame — composition matched to Frame 1 for the loop.

FRAME-JOIN HANDOFF (LOOP): Matches Frame 1 exactly — hands ready at her sides, horizon gaze, peak-edge framing — so the reel loops back to Frame 1 with no visible seam.

NEGATIVE: No real logos/readable text, no extra fingers, no second face, no immodest fit, no warped anatomy, no visible loop seam.

### Frame 7 of 7 — VIDEO PROMPT (LOOP)

IDENTITY & CHARACTER-CONSISTENCY LOCK: render Aira strictly from the locked identity reference and hold her the SAME PERSON for the entire 6-second clip and every generated frame. Treat identity as a FIXED skeleton that never changes — bone structure (skull, cheekbones, jawline, chin), overall face shape and proportions, eye shape, spacing and iris colour, nose and lip shape, skin tone and real skin texture (visible pores, fine peach-fuzz; no plastic smoothing, no beautification creep, no face re-shaping), hairline, hair colour and texture, height, build and hand/finger anatomy. ONLY the soft expression muscles may move — eyelids, brows, cheeks and mouth corners — together with the eyes, gaze and head; expression and lip-sync animate ON TOP of that fixed identity and must NEVER alter the face shape, the eye colour, or who she is. Keep expression changes smooth and moderate and lead them with the EYES and GAZE (soft smiles, brow lifts, a parted breath, eyes tracing the object) — no extreme grimace, no wide-mouth distortion, no hard squint, no rapid expression flicker that would warp the geometry; favour one clean expression transition per clip. ABSOLUTE ZERO identity drift: no morphing, melting, smearing, rubbery warping, face-swapping, twinning or a second/duplicate subject, no age, weight, ethnicity or gender shift, no extra, missing or fused fingers or limbs. Identity stays identical at the first frame, every in-between frame, the loop seam and the last frame. Through any transform, impossible move or fast action ONLY the intended element (wardrobe, environment, props or effect) changes — her face, identity and proportions stay fully recognizable; interpolate strictly between the locked keyframes and never invent a new face, new hands, extra limbs or a second subject. Do not mirror, flip or invert the frame.

SHOT TYPE: Loop-close establishing; subject ~45% as the drone climbs.

DRONE / RIG NOTE: Cinema drone climb (hero level → high-side over the spire), the mirror of Frame 1's orbit-descent.

CAMERA MOVEMENT: The drone rises and arcs back to the Frame 1 establishing position; one smooth move, no jitter.

LENS: 35mm-equiv, f/2.0.

SUBJECT ACTION — MICRO-TIMECODE:

`00:17.0–00:18.0` she stands back at the lip of the spire, hands ready at her sides, the composed quarter-smile returning

`00:18.0–00:19.2` a held centering breath as the drone climbs over the cloud-sea

`00:19.2–00:20.2` the framing matches Frame 1 exactly, ready to loop

PHYSICS & MOTION: Real drifting cloud-sea and god-rays shifting with the drone parallax, natural strand whip — matched to Frame 1.

LIGHTING: Warm gold sunrise key, cool sky-bounce, molten-amber rim — matched to Frame 1.

ENVIRONMENT: The granite spire at sunrise, infinite cloud-sea, distant peaks.

SPEED RAMP: 100% real-time.

AUDIO (diegetic + master-track button): the vast high-altitude wind bed returns (the Frame 1 bed); `00:17.4` a soft membrane-flutter as she resets; `00:18.0` her slow centering exhale (no word). Master-track resolves on a sustained vast chord so the reel loops with no audible seam. No words from Aira.

DURATION: 6.0s (running total 00:20.2 active; ~27s with handles).

FRAME RATE + MOTION BLUR: 24fps, 180° shutter, natural blur on the drone climb; real-time.

LIP-SYNC: None — lips composed.

FRAME-JOIN HANDOFF (LOOP): Resolves to the exact Frame 1 hook (hands ready, horizon gaze, drone high-side) so Frame 7 → Frame 1 loops invisibly.

NEGATIVE: No Aira speaking, no real logos, no stutter-cut, no warped anatomy, no visible loop seam, identity flicker.

---

🎚️ MASTER TRACK BRIEF — Concept 08 (Base Jump): A sublime cinematic score built around vast, soaring flight. Opens in near-silence under the edge-of-the-peak hook (Frame 1) with a single sustained string-pad and a lone breath-tone in the wind; a slow heartbeat pulse and a rising string-swell enter on the leap (Frame 2); the phoenix-ignition (Frames 3–4) is scored with a warm choral bloom and a crystalline fire-shimmer layered over the wind-roar, building to a soaring orchestral-and-choir PEAK on the full blaze; the canyon carve (Frame 5) rides the swell with sweeping strings; the track ducks cleanly under the narrator VO at the flare (Frame 6 — "The fall only frightens those... who never learned they had wings."); then it resolves to a vast sustained chord at the peak-edge (Frame 7) for a seamless loop. Cinematic, sublime and triumphant, kept under the diegetic wind, membrane and living-flame SFX — present, never a full mix. (Distinct from every other Master Track Brief in this set.)

---

## 🏜️ CONCEPT 09 — DUNE ASSAULT · The sand parts like towering walls of water as she charges through

Pillar / Format: Desert Rally Hero / VO · 9:16 vertical reel · VEO 3.1 (motion) + Nano Banana Pro (stills)

Hero: Aira driving a long-travel desert rally-raid buggy, single accent of an electric-orange light-bar and roll-cage glow; self-aware, fluid, fully human driver — fierce composure with breath-true micro-expressions behind a clear visor

Setting: A vast Saharan dune-sea at golden hour — endless rolling sand ridges, a low burning sun, heat-haze shimmering, fine wind-blown sand-veils streaming off the crests

Wardrobe (AW): A fitted matte-sand rally race suit — charcoal with electric-orange seam-piping, high modest collar, full-coverage fire-resistant weave, zipped clean, nothing loose to snag

Hair (AP): A sleek low braid tucked into the suit collar, a clean center part, a few face-framing strands free at the visor edge; color locked

Makeup (AQ): Clean kinetic glow — warm satin skin, soft bronze contour, defined brow, a warm terracotta stained lip, inner-corner brighten; real pores

Footwear: Armored sand-rally boots with electric-orange lace-flash and reinforced ankle, buckles tight, laces tucked

Accessories: A clear-shield rally helmet (visor up for identity), armored gloves, a sealed harness-rig (non-speaking comms); nothing dangling

The Impossible Move: As the buggy charges the dune face, the sand parts like towering walls of water — the dune crest splits and rises into two great curling walls of liquid-gold sand on either side, a parted sea she drives through, then they collapse back into ordinary cascading sand behind her. (START keyframe = Frame 3 — the bow-wave of sand begins to part and wall up; PEAK = Frame 4 — full towering sand-walls parted around her; END keyframe = Frame 5 — the walls collapse back behind as she crests onto open flat.)

Concept Line / Twist payoff: "Stand still and it buries you. Charge, and it parts."

Duration · frames: ~23s · 6 frames

Mood: Fierce, epic, sun-scorched calm

Composition signature: Vast desert scale — a lone machine carving a corridor through towering gold sand-walls under a burning sun

Camera Language: High establishing drone over the dune-sea → low ground-tracking rig kicking sand → in-cockpit gimbal on the charge → FPV through the parted sand-canyon → crane rise on the crest → mirror drone pull-up to loop

Grade / Color Script: Scorched gold — burning amber sun, warm sand-gold, electric-orange rig accent, deep warm shadow, full saturated mid-tone; the sand-wall beat shimmering liquid-gold with backlit translucence

Narrator VO (AR): One line, landed near Frame 5, warm natural Indian-accented female narrator (NOT Aira's mouth, never subject-speaking)

Frame-Join Continuity: Each frame's exit pose/cue = next frame's entry; the sand-parting runs continuously across Frames 3→5 (part → tower → collapse) so the charge reads as one unbroken motion; Frame 6 mirrors Frame 1 for a seamless loop

Identity safety: Same Aira face/proportions every frame; modest rally suit; adult, body-safe; no real logos/sponsor text (kept abstract)

---

### Frame 3 of 6 — IMAGE PROMPT (START KEYFRAME — the bow-wave of sand begins to part and wall up)

### Frame 3 of 6 — VIDEO PROMPT (START KEYFRAME)

IDENTITY & CHARACTER-CONSISTENCY LOCK: render Aira strictly from the locked identity reference and hold her the SAME PERSON for the entire 6-second clip and every generated frame. Treat identity as a FIXED skeleton that never changes — bone structure (skull, cheekbones, jawline, chin), overall face shape and proportions, eye shape, spacing and iris colour, nose and lip shape, skin tone and real skin texture (visible pores, fine peach-fuzz; no plastic smoothing, no beautification creep, no face re-shaping), hairline, hair colour and texture, height, build and hand/finger anatomy. Keep expression changes smooth and moderate and lead them with the EYES and GAZE (soft smiles, brow lifts, a parted breath, eyes tracing the object) — no extreme grimace, no wide-mouth distortion, no hard squint, no rapid expression flicker that would warp the geometry; favour one clean expression transition per clip. ABSOLUTE ZERO identity drift: no morphing, melting, smearing, rubbery warping, face-swapping, twinning or a second/duplicate subject, no age, weight, ethnicity or gender shift, no extra, missing or fused fingers or limbs. Identity stays identical at the first frame, every in-between frame, the loop seam and the last frame. Through any transform, impossible move or fast action ONLY the intended element (wardrobe, environment, props or effect) changes — her face, identity and proportions stay fully recognizable; interpolate strictly between the locked keyframes and never invent a new face, new hands, extra limbs or a second subject. Do not mirror, flip or invert the frame.

FRAME-JOIN HANDOFF (LOOP): Matches Frame 1 exactly — hand on the roll-cage, calm dune gaze, crest framing — so the reel loops back to Frame 1 with no visible seam.

NEGATIVE: No real logos/readable text, no extra fingers, no second face, no immodest fit, no warped anatomy, no visible loop seam.

### Frame 6 of 6 — VIDEO PROMPT (LOOP)

IDENTITY & CHARACTER-CONSISTENCY LOCK: render Aira strictly from the locked identity reference and hold her the SAME PERSON for the entire 6-second clip and every generated frame. Treat identity as a FIXED skeleton that never changes — bone structure (skull, cheekbones, jawline, chin), overall face shape and proportions, eye shape, spacing and iris colour, nose and lip shape, skin tone and real skin texture (visible pores, fine peach-fuzz; no plastic smoothing, no beautification creep, no face re-shaping), hairline, hair colour and texture, height, build and hand/finger anatomy. ONLY the soft expression muscles may move — eyelids, brows, cheeks and mouth corners — together with the eyes, gaze and head; expression and lip-sync animate ON TOP of that fixed identity and must NEVER alter the face shape, the eye colour, or who she is. Keep expression changes smooth and moderate and lead them with the EYES and GAZE (soft smiles, brow lifts, a parted breath, eyes tracing the object) — no extreme grimace, no wide-mouth distortion, no hard squint, no rapid expression flicker that would warp the geometry; favour one clean expression transition per clip. ABSOLUTE ZERO identity drift: no morphing, melting, smearing, rubbery warping, face-swapping, twinning or a second/duplicate subject, no age, weight, ethnicity or gender shift, no extra, missing or fused fingers or limbs. Identity stays identical at the first frame, every in-between frame, the loop seam and the last frame. Through any transform, impossible move or fast action ONLY the intended element (wardrobe, environment, props or effect) changes — her face, identity and proportions stay fully recognizable; interpolate strictly between the locked keyframes and never invent a new face, new hands, extra limbs or a second subject. Do not mirror, flip or invert the frame.

SHOT TYPE: Loop-close establishing; subject ~45% as the drone rises.

DRONE / RIG NOTE: Cinema drone pull-up (hero level → high over dune-sea), the mirror of Frame 1's descent.

CAMERA MOVEMENT: The drone rises and pulls back to the Frame 1 establishing position; one smooth move, no jitter.

LENS: 35mm-equiv, f/2.0.

`00:15.8–00:16.8` the framing matches Frame 1 exactly, ready to loop

LIGHTING: Warm sun key, amber sand-bounce, electric-orange rim — matched to Frame 1.

SPEED RAMP: 100% real-time.

AUDIO (diegetic + master-track button): the vast desert wind and fine sand bed returns (the Frame 1 bed); `00:14.0` a soft glove-creak as she resets; `00:14.6` her slow centering exhale (no word). Master-track resolves on a sustained warm chord so the reel loops with no audible seam. No words from Aira.

DURATION: 6.0s (running total 00:16.8 active; ~23s with handles).

FRAME RATE + MOTION BLUR: 24fps, 180° shutter, natural blur on the drone rise; real-time.

LIP-SYNC: None — lips composed.

NEGATIVE: No Aira speaking, no real logos, no stutter-cut, no warped anatomy, no visible loop seam, identity flicker.

🎚️ MASTER TRACK BRIEF — Concept 09 (Dune Assault): A fierce, epic desert-cinematic score built around relentless forward charge. Opens vast and dry under the crest hook (Frame 1) with a low drone-pad, a lone duduk-like wind-melody and a distant tribal-drum heartbeat; a driving percussion pattern and a deep sub enter on the charge (Frame 2); the sand-parting beats (Frames 3–4) are scored with a deep oceanic swell and granular cascade-textures layered over the engine, building to a thunderous orchestral-and-taiko PEAK as the walls tower; the track ducks cleanly under the narrator VO at the crest (Frame 5 — "Stand still and it buries you... charge, and it parts."); then it resolves to a sustained warm chord at the dune-crest (Frame 6) for a seamless loop. Epic, fierce and scorched, tempo driving around 100–108 BPM, minor and vast with a warm desert top. Kept under the diegetic engine, wind, sand-roar and cascade SFX — present, never a full mix. (Distinct from every other Master Track Brief in this set.)

## 🌊 CONCEPT 10 — CLIFF DIVE · The sea turns to a liquid-mercury mirror as she falls into it

Pillar / Format: Aerial / Aquatic Hero / SILENT (no VO) · 9:16 vertical reel · VEO 3.1 (motion) + Nano Banana Pro (stills)

Hero: Aira executing a high cliff dive from a towering sea-cliff; self-aware, fluid, fully human diver — serene fearless grace with breath-true micro-expressions and perfect athletic body-control

Setting: A colossal sea-cliff at golden-hour sunset — sheer dark basalt, a turquoise-to-sapphire ocean far below, sun low and burning on the horizon, sea-spray and light-mist drifting, gulls distant

Wardrobe (AW): A sleek full-coverage athletic dive suit — deep teal with a thin silver seam-line, high modest neckline, long-line full-coverage performance cut, sealed and streamlined, nothing loose

Hair (AP): A tight low braided bun sealed clean (dive-ready), a clean center part, color locked; no loose strands that would obscure identity in the fall

Makeup (AQ): Clean water-proof kinetic glow — dewy satin skin, soft contour, defined brow, a rose-bronze tinted lip, inner-corner brighten; real pores

Footwear: Barefoot (dive) — clean arched feet, pointed on the launch; (a pair of slip-off sandals left at the cliff edge in Frame 1/6)

Accessories: A thin silver wrist-band and a sealed silver ear-stud (minimal, dive-safe); nothing dangling

The Impossible Move: As she falls toward the sea, the ocean surface transforms into a perfect liquid-mercury mirror — a flawless chrome-silver plane reflecting her falling body and the burning sky, then she pierces it and it ripples back into ordinary turquoise water with a crown of silver droplets. (START keyframe = Frame 3 — mid-dive, the sea below begins turning to liquid mercury; PEAK = Frame 4 — full mirror-sea, her reflection falling to meet her; END keyframe = Frame 5 — she pierces the mercury and it ripples back to water.)

Concept Line / Twist payoff: (silent — the mirror-sea and the pierce ARE the payoff; no spoken or narrated line.)

Duration · frames: ~22s · 6 frames

Mood: Serene, sublime, weightless-calm

Composition signature: Vast vertical drop — a lone diver between a burning sky and a mirror of liquid silver, perfect symmetry at the peak

Camera Language: High orbiting drone on the cliff → vertigo top-down on the leap → chase-drone on the dive → FPV falling-to-mirror with reflection symmetry → underwater-to-surface crane on the pierce → mirror drone climb to loop

Grade / Color Script: Sublime sunset — turquoise-sapphire sea, burning gold-coral sky, liquid-silver mercury accent, deep cool shadow, full saturated mid-tone; the mirror beat blazing chrome-silver with a coral sky reflected

Voice: SILENT — no subject voice, no narrator; diegetic SFX + master track only

Frame-Join Continuity: Each frame's exit pose/cue = next frame's entry; the mercury transform runs continuously across Frames 3→5 (turn → mirror → pierce) so the dive reads as one unbroken fall; Frame 6 mirrors Frame 1 for a seamless loop

Identity safety: Same Aira face/proportions every frame; modest full-coverage dive suit; adult, body-safe, athletic and non-sexualized; no real logos

BIOMECHANICS & WEIGHT: Standing at the very lip of the basalt cliff, toes to the edge, torso tall with a dancer's lift, weight balanced through both feet, shoulders settled and squared to the drop, spine long (living stillness).

PHYSICS (animated next): Sea-spray and light-mist drifting up the cliff face, the ocean shimmering far below, the low sun burning on the horizon, a sea-breeze tugging the bun's loose wisp — environment alive, diver poised.

ORIENTATION LOCK — preserve this exact left-to-right composition; do not mirror, flip or invert the frame.

Treat identity as a FIXED skeleton that never changes — bone structure (skull, cheekbones, jawline, chin), overall face shape and proportions, eye shape, spacing and iris colour, nose and lip shape, skin tone and real skin texture (visible pores, fine peach-fuzz; no plastic smoothing, no beautification creep, no face re-shaping), hairline, hair colour and texture, height, build and hand/finger anatomy. ONLY the soft expression muscles may move — eyelids, brows, cheeks and mouth corners — together with the eyes, gaze and head; expression and lip-sync animate ON TOP of that fixed identity and must NEVER alter the face shape, the eye colour, or who she is. Keep expression changes smooth and moderate and lead them with the EYES and GAZE (soft smiles, brow lifts, a parted breath, eyes tracing the object) — no extreme grimace, no wide-mouth distortion, no hard squint, no rapid expression flicker that would warp the geometry; favour one clean expression transition per clip. ABSOLUTE ZERO identity drift: no morphing, melting, smearing, rubbery warping, face-swapping, twinning or a second/duplicate subject, no age, weight, ethnicity or gender shift, no extra, missing or fused fingers or limbs. Identity stays identical at the first frame, every in-between frame, the loop seam and the last frame. Through any transform, impossible move or fast action ONLY the intended element (wardrobe, environment, props or effect) changes — her face, identity and proportions stay fully recognizable; interpolate strictly between the locked keyframes and never invent a new face, new hands, extra limbs or a second subject. Do not mirror, flip or invert the frame.

SHOT TYPE: Chase-drone falling medium; subject + transforming sea fill ~58%.

DRONE / RIG NOTE: Chase drone just above/behind her dive-line, catching the dive + the mercury turn below.

CAMERA MOVEMENT: A driving follow down the dive-line + faint settle as the sea turns; one continuous move.

LENS: 35mm-equiv, f/2.2.

SUBJECT ACTION — MICRO-TIMECODE:

`00:05.6–00:06.0` she holds full graceful swan-dive extension, arrow-straight toward the sea

`00:06.0–00:06.5` the ocean below smooths and turns to a liquid-mercury sheen, the first chrome mirror spreading

`00:06.5–00:07.2` her reflection appears clear in the silver, the burning sky mirrored, she falls toward it

`00:07.2–00:07.6` the mirror nears full chrome, cueing the mirror peak

PHYSICS & MOTION: Authentic dive-line, real liquid-to-mirror transform with true surface-tension flow (smoothing, not noise), genuine reflection fidelity — identity locked.

LIGHTING: Warm sunset key; the mercury kicks cool chrome; silver rim.

ENVIRONMENT: The dive-line above the transforming sea, water turning to silver.

SPEED RAMP: Ramp 24→96fps across the turn `00:06.0–06.5` (the sea mirrors in slow-mo), back to 48fps.

AUDIO (diegetic + reaction): wind-rush bed; `00:06.0` a deep glassy shimmer-tone as the sea turns to mercury + a soft metallic surface-ring (cool, crystalline, musical); `00:06.5` a low resonant hum as the mirror spreads; a held awed breath `00:07.0` (no word). Master-track pad begins a slow upward bend. SILENT — no VO.

NEGATIVE: No Aira speaking, no real logos, no stutter-cut, no warped anatomy, no visible loop seam, identity flicker.

---

🎚️ MASTER TRACK BRIEF — Concept 10 (Cliff Dive): A serene, sublime cinematic score built around weightless descent — entirely instrumental, no vocals of any kind (silent reel). Opens vast and hushed under the cliff-edge hook (Frame 1) with a single sustained string-pad and a lone piano note over the coastal wind; a slow harp-and-string swell enters on the leap (Frame 2); the mercury transform (Frames 3–4) is scored with a crystalline glass-harmonica shimmer and a glassy mirror-resonance layered over the wind, building to a soaring orchestral-and-glass PEAK on the full mirror-sea; the pierce (Frame 5) lands a clean cymbal-bloom resolving into a warm under-water hush; then it resolves to a vast sustained chord at the cliff-edge (Frame 6) for a seamless loop. Sublime, serene and weightless, tempo slow and floating, major-tinged and luminous. Kept under the diegetic wind, surf, mirror-resonance and water-pierce SFX — present, never a full mix, and with no vocals of any kind (silent reel). (Distinct from every other Master Track Brief in this set.)

---

## 🛸 CONCEPT 11 — HOVER-CHASE · The hoverbike leaves a chain of time-echo clones streaming behind her

Pillar / Format: Sci-Fi Kinetic Hero / VO · 9:16 vertical reel · VEO 3.1 (motion) + Nano Banana Pro (stills)

Hero: Aira riding a sleek levitating hoverbike through a neon megacity skyway at night, single accent of an electric-cyan thruster glow; self-aware, fluid, fully human rider — cool predatory composure with breath-true micro-expressions behind a clear visor

Setting: A towering neon-megacity sky-canyon at night — colossal holographic billboards, rivers of flying-traffic light-trails far below, rain-slick mag-lev skyways, drifting neon mist, a deep indigo sky

Wardrobe (AW): A fitted matte-charcoal techwear riding suit with electric-cyan light-piping along the seams, high modest collar, full-coverage armored panels, sealed, nothing loose to snag

Hair (AP): A sleek low braid tucked into the suit collar, a clean center part, a few face-framing strands free at the visor edge; color locked

Makeup (AQ): Clean kinetic glow — neutral satin skin, soft contour, defined brow, a cool plum stained lip, inner-corner brighten; real pores

Footwear: Armored mag-grip riding boots with electric-cyan lace-flash and reinforced ankle, buckles tight, laces tucked

Accessories: A clear-shield aero helmet (visor up for identity), armored riding gloves with cyan knuckle-lines, a low-profile wrist-HUD (non-speaking); nothing dangling

The Impossible Move: As she throttles the hoverbike to full speed, she leaves a streaming chain of translucent time-echo clones — a trail of moment-delayed ghost-riders of herself and the bike, each a soft cyan after-image of the instant before, fanning out behind her like frozen echoes of time, then snapping back to collapse into a single rider. (START keyframe = Frame 3 — the first time-echo clones begin spawning behind her; PEAK = Frame 4 — a full streaming chain of echo-clones; END keyframe = Frame 5 — the echoes collapse back into the single rider.)

Concept Line / Twist payoff: "By the time they see her... she's already gone."

Duration · frames: ~27s · 7 frames

Mood: Cool, predatory, electric-calm

Composition signature: Deep neon sky-canyon perspective — a lone rider trailing a comet's-tail of glowing time-echoes through a city of light

Camera Language: High establishing drone over the sky-canyon → low skyway-tracking rig → in-saddle gimbal on the throttle → FPV through the echo-chain → crane rise on the collapse → eye-macro for the line → mirror drone pull-up to loop

Grade / Color Script: Neon-noir night — electric-cyan and magenta billboards, indigo sky, the echo-clones glowing translucent cyan, deep uncrushed blacks, wet skyway speculars, full saturated mid-tone

Narrator VO (AR): One line, landed near Frame 6, warm natural Indian-accented female narrator (NOT Aira's mouth, never subject-speaking)

Frame-Join Continuity: Each frame's exit pose/cue = next frame's entry; the echo-chain runs continuously across Frames 3→5 (spawn → stream → collapse) so the chase reads as one unbroken motion; Frame 7 mirrors Frame 1 for a seamless loop

Identity safety: Same Aira face/proportions every frame (and in every echo-clone); modest armored suit; adult, body-safe; no real logos/readable billboard text (kept abstract neon)

---

### Frame 1 of 7 — IMAGE PROMPT

IDENTITY LOCK: Aira [paste identity-lock reference sheet here].

WARDROBE: The matte-charcoal techwear suit with electric-cyan light-piping and high modest collar, one cool magenta rim sliding along the shoulder, pristine, sealed, zero snags.

HAIR: The sleek low braid tucked into the collar, a few face-framing strands free at the visor edge, razor-clean hairline, color locked.

FOOTWEAR & ACCESSORIES: Armored mag-grip boots with electric-cyan lace-flash set on the bike's pegs; armored gloves with cyan knuckle-lines; wrist-HUD glowing faint; clear-shield helmet visor up.

HANDS & NAILS: One gloved hand resting on the hoverbike's grip, the other loose at her thigh, fingertips light, no white-knuckle tension; armored knuckles; natural poised posture.

FACIAL MICRO-DYNAMICS: Chin level, a calm predatory quarter-smile pulling the left corner a hair tighter, lips parted barely 1mm on a held breath, eyes direct down the skyway with a crisp twin neon catchlight, the faintest focused set at the outer brow.

BIOMECHANICS & WEIGHT: Seated astride the hovering bike at the skyway's edge, torso rotated about 8° to open the shoulder to lens, weight settled and balanced on the levitating frame, front shoulder dropped, spine long and ready (living stillness).

PHYSICS (animated next): Neon mist drifting across the skyway, billboards pulsing, flying-traffic light-trails flowing far below, the bike's thrusters shimmering cyan, the free strands tugged by the night air — environment alive, rider poised.

KINETIC STILLNESS (8 layers): 1) a free strand whipping at her temple in the night air 2) neon mist drifting across the skyway 3) a holographic billboard pulsing soft 4) flying-traffic light-trails flowing far below 5) chest rising on a slow shallow inhale 6) a cyan specular sliding along the thruster cowl 7) the suit piping catching a micro rim-shift as she breathes 8) a slow eyelash settle completing a blink.

SPATIAL LOGIC: FG = the skyway edge and the bike's front cowl nearest lens at ~20% depth, tack sharp; MG = Aira on the bike, the hero; BG = the neon sky-canyon plunging deep with billboards and traffic-rivers, clean separation, immense scale.

CAMERA ANGLE: A slow high establishing DRONE easing down from over the sky-canyon to a clean chest-up hero level — revealing the megacity scale before settling on her.

LIGHTING: KEY = cool magenta billboard-light keying from camera-left; FILL = soft cyan bounce off the wet skyway lifting the under-jaw; RIM = electric-cyan thruster-glow kissing her shoulder; PRACTICAL = billboards, thrusters and traffic-trails; SEPARATION = the sky-canyon pulled deep so she reads ~2 stops up; BOUNCE = a wet-skyway kick on the suit.

FRAMING: 9:16, Aira centered lower-third, vast neon sky-canyon headroom above, the bike cowl in the lower frame, immense negative space to receive the chase.
SUBJECT FRAMING & POSITION: An establishing-to-hero framing holds Aira, centered lower-third, vast neon sky-canyon headroom above, the bike cowl in the lower frame, immense negative space to receive the chase. She is seated astride the hovering bike at the skyway's edge, torso rotated about 8° to open the shoulder to lens, weight settled and balanced on the levitating frame, front shoulder dropped, spine long and ready. The camera holds a mid distance, Aira the sharp central figure of the Hover-chase beat, with the action arcing the upper frame above her. She faces front to the lens. Her pose reads as seated astride the hovering bike at the skyway's edge, torso rotated about 8° to open the shoulder to lens, weight settled and balanced on the levitating frame, front shoulder dropped, spine long and ready (living stillness) — gaze pinned forward along the ride, fierce and steady; head low and committed in the line; both shoulders rolled forward over the mount; the RIGHT hand gripping for control while the LEFT hand braces and holds on; torso leaning into a committed riding crouch, core tight; waist set forward, hips locked to the mount; the RIGHT leg and LEFT leg clamped to the flanks with knees gripping; feet set and braced, weight committed forward over the mount; hair streaming back off the speed. ORIENTATION LOCK — preserve this exact left-to-right composition; do not mirror, flip or invert the frame.

LENS + DOF + BOKEH: 35mm-equiv, f/2.0, shallow — the sky-canyon melting to creamy neon bokeh, Aira tack-sharp.

COMPOSITION REFERENCE: A neon-noir sci-fi hero still — rider on a hoverbike at the edge of a city of light, scroll-stopping.

ATMOSPHERE: Cool, electric, charged — the hush of a held breath before the launch.

COLOR GRADE: Neon-noir night — electric-cyan and magenta, indigo sky, deep uncrushed blacks, wet speculars, full mid-tone, no murk.

TEXTURE & MICRO-DETAIL: The techwear suit reads as real armored fabric, the bike reads as true brushed alloy and glowing thruster, helmet shell reads real, soft peach-fuzz catches the rim at her jaw, neon mist drifts authentically.

FRAME-JOIN HANDOFF: Ends locked on her hand on the grip and the calm down-skyway gaze — Frame 2 opens on that hand twisting the throttle as the bike surges forward.

NEGATIVE: No real logos/readable billboard text, no extra fingers, no second face, no immodest fit, no warped anatomy, no floating shadows, plastic skin, oversharpened, watermarks.

### Frame 1 of 7 — VIDEO PROMPT

IDENTITY & CHARACTER-CONSISTENCY LOCK: render Aira strictly from the locked identity reference and hold her the SAME PERSON for the entire 6-second clip and every generated frame. Treat identity as a FIXED skeleton that never changes — bone structure (skull, cheekbones, jawline, chin), overall face shape and proportions, eye shape, spacing and iris colour, nose and lip shape, skin tone and real skin texture (visible pores, fine peach-fuzz; no plastic smoothing, no beautification creep, no face re-shaping), hairline, hair colour and texture, height, build and hand/finger anatomy. ONLY the soft expression muscles may move — eyelids, brows, cheeks and mouth corners — together with the eyes, gaze and head; expression and lip-sync animate ON TOP of that fixed identity and must NEVER alter the face shape, the eye colour, or who she is. Keep expression changes smooth and moderate and lead them with the EYES and GAZE (soft smiles, brow lifts, a parted breath, eyes tracing the object) — no extreme grimace, no wide-mouth distortion, no hard squint, no rapid expression flicker that would warp the geometry; favour one clean expression transition per clip. ABSOLUTE ZERO identity drift: no morphing, melting, smearing, rubbery warping, face-swapping, twinning or a second/duplicate subject, no age, weight, ethnicity or gender shift, no extra, missing or fused fingers or limbs. Identity stays identical at the first frame, every in-between frame, the loop seam and the last frame. Through any transform, impossible move or fast action ONLY the intended element (wardrobe, environment, props or effect) changes — her face, identity and proportions stay fully recognizable; interpolate strictly between the locked keyframes and never invent a new face, new hands, extra limbs or a second subject. Do not mirror, flip or invert the frame.

SHOT TYPE: Establishing-to-hero, chest-up resolve; subject fills ~40% rising to ~55%.

DRONE / RIG NOTE: Cinema drone descent (high over sky-canyon → eye level) revealing the megacity, settling to a hero frame; one smooth move, no jitter.

CAMERA MOVEMENT: The drone eases down and settles with a faint 4% push-in.

LENS: 35mm-equiv, f/2.0.

SUBJECT ACTION — MICRO-TIMECODE:

`00:01.2–00:02.4` she lifts her gaze down the skyway as the calm predatory quarter-smile blooms on a soft inhale

`00:02.4–00:03.2` her hand settles on the throttle grip, the held-breath beat before the launch

LIGHTING: Cool magenta billboard key with cyan skyway-bounce; electric-cyan thruster rim steady; billboards live; sky-canyon held deep.

ENVIRONMENT: Neon megacity sky-canyon at night, billboards, traffic-rivers, drifting mist.

SPEED RAMP: 100% real-time throughout.

AUDIO (diegetic, timed): `00:00` a deep night-city ambience — distant hover-traffic hum, a faint synth-billboard jingle and wind throughout; `00:01.0` the hoverbike's low idling thruster-whine; `00:01.4` her slow centering exhale inside the helmet (breath only, no words); `00:02.6` the thrusters spooling as she preps. Master-track bed barely-there. No VO this frame.

LENS + DOF + BOKEH: 35mm-equiv, f/2.0, shallow — matched to Frame 1.

COMPOSITION REFERENCE: Identical hook to Frame 1 — rider on the hoverbike at the edge of a city of light, engineered to loop invisibly.

ATMOSPHERE: Cool, electric, hushed — the chase resolving softly back into the opening breath where it began.

COLOR GRADE: Neon-noir night — electric-cyan and magenta, indigo sky, deep uncrushed blacks, wet speculars, full mid-tone — matched to Frame 1.

TEXTURE & MICRO-DETAIL: Armored techwear suit, brushed-alloy bike and glowing thruster, helmet shell, soft peach-fuzz at the jaw, drifting neon mist — all matched to Frame 1 for a clean loop.

FRAME-JOIN HANDOFF (LOOP): Matches Frame 1 exactly — hand on the grip, down-skyway gaze, ledge framing — so the reel loops back to Frame 1 with no visible seam.

NEGATIVE: No real logos/readable text, no extra fingers, no second face, no immodest fit, no warped anatomy, no visible loop seam.

### Frame 7 of 7 — VIDEO PROMPT (LOOP)

IDENTITY & CHARACTER-CONSISTENCY LOCK: render Aira strictly from the locked identity reference and hold her the SAME PERSON for the entire 6-second clip and every generated frame. Treat identity as a FIXED skeleton that never changes — bone structure (skull, cheekbones, jawline, chin), overall face shape and proportions, eye shape, spacing and iris colour, nose and lip shape, skin tone and real skin texture (visible pores, fine peach-fuzz; no plastic smoothing, no beautification creep, no face re-shaping), hairline, hair colour and texture, height, build and hand/finger anatomy. ONLY the soft expression muscles may move — eyelids, brows, cheeks and mouth corners — together with the eyes, gaze and head; expression and lip-sync animate ON TOP of that fixed identity and must NEVER alter the face shape, the eye colour, or who she is. Keep expression changes smooth and moderate and lead them with the EYES and GAZE (soft smiles, brow lifts, a parted breath, eyes tracing the object) — no extreme grimace, no wide-mouth distortion, no hard squint, no rapid expression flicker that would warp the geometry; favour one clean expression transition per clip. ABSOLUTE ZERO identity drift: no morphing, melting, smearing, rubbery warping, face-swapping, twinning or a second/duplicate subject, no age, weight, ethnicity or gender shift, no extra, missing or fused fingers or limbs. Identity stays identical at the first frame, every in-between frame, the loop seam and the last frame. Through any transform, impossible move or fast action ONLY the intended element (wardrobe, environment, props or effect) changes — her face, identity and proportions stay fully recognizable; interpolate strictly between the locked keyframes and never invent a new face, new hands, extra limbs or a second subject. Do not mirror, flip or invert the frame.

SHOT TYPE: Loop-close establishing; subject ~45% as the drone climbs.

DRONE / RIG NOTE: Cinema drone pull-up (hero level → high over sky-canyon), the mirror of Frame 1's descent.

CAMERA MOVEMENT: The drone rises and pulls back to the Frame 1 establishing position; one smooth move, no jitter.

LENS: 35mm-equiv, f/2.0.

SUBJECT ACTION — MICRO-TIMECODE:

`00:17.0–00:18.0` she eases back to the ledge on the idling hoverbike, hand on the grip, the composed quarter-smile returning

`00:18.0–00:19.2` a held breath as the drone climbs over the sky-canyon

`00:19.2–00:20.2` the framing matches Frame 1 exactly, ready to loop

PHYSICS & MOTION: Real drifting neon mist and traffic-trails shifting with the drone parallax, natural strand whip, thruster-shimmer — matched to Frame 1.

LIGHTING: Cool magenta key, cyan skyway-bounce, electric-cyan rim — matched to Frame 1.

ENVIRONMENT: The neon megacity sky-canyon at night, billboards, traffic-rivers.

SPEED RAMP: 100% real-time.

AUDIO (diegetic + master-track button): the deep night-city ambience and idling thruster bed returns (the Frame 1 bed); `00:17.4` a soft glove-creak as she resets; `00:18.0` her slow centering exhale (no word). Master-track resolves on a sustained warm chord so the reel loops with no audible seam. No words from Aira.

DURATION: 6.0s (running total 00:20.2 active; ~27s with handles).

FRAME RATE + MOTION BLUR: 24fps, 180° shutter, natural blur on the drone climb; real-time.

LIP-SYNC: None — lips composed.

FRAME-JOIN HANDOFF (LOOP): Resolves to the exact Frame 1 hook (hand on grip, down-skyway gaze, drone high) so Frame 7 → Frame 1 loops invisibly.

NEGATIVE: No Aira speaking, no real logos, no stutter-cut, no warped anatomy, no visible loop seam, identity flicker.

🎚️ MASTER TRACK BRIEF — Concept 11 (Hover-Chase): A cool, propulsive sci-fi neon score built around relentless forward chase. Opens deep and electric under the ledge hook (Frame 1) with a low sub-pulse, a glassy synth-arpeggio and a distant city-hum; a driving four-on-the-floor pulse and a gated bass enter on the launch (Frame 2); the time-echo beats (Frames 3–4) are scored with phasing delay-arpeggios and a glitch-shimmer layered over the thrusters, building to a soaring synthwave PEAK as the echo-chain streams; the chain-collapse (Frame 5) lands a reverse-swell resolving warm; the track ducks cleanly under the narrator VO at the cruise (Frame 6 — "By the time they see her... she's already gone."); then it resolves to a sustained glowing synth-chord at the ledge (Frame 7) for a seamless loop. Tempo driving around 110–118 BPM, minor and electric with a bright neon top. Kept under the diegetic thruster, mag-lev, wind and time-warble SFX — present, never a full mix. (Distinct from every other Master Track Brief in this set.)

## 💎 CONCEPT 12 — VAULT RUN · The laser security grid bends and parts around her as she runs through

Pillar / Format: Heist / Agility Hero / VO · 9:16 vertical reel · VEO 3.1 (motion) + Nano Banana Pro (stills)

Hero: Aira running and sliding through a high-security vault corridor laced with a dense laser grid; self-aware, fluid, fully human infiltrator — cool razor focus with breath-true micro-expressions and precise, athletic body-control

Setting: A sleek high-security vault corridor at night — polished obsidian floor, brushed-titanium walls, a dense lattice of crimson-and-cyan security lasers crisscrossing the space, a glowing vault door at the far end, faint server-room mist and cold blue ambient

Wardrobe (AW): A fitted matte-black tactical heist suit with subtle gunmetal seam-lines, high modest collar, full-coverage armored-stretch panels, sealed and streamlined, nothing loose to snag

Hair (AP): A tight low braided bun sealed clean (agility-ready), a clean center part, a few face-framing strands free; color locked

Makeup (AQ): Clean kinetic glow — neutral satin skin, soft contour, defined brow, a cool berry stained lip, inner-corner brighten; real pores

Footwear: Low-profile black tactical grip-shoes with a thin silent sole and gunmetal lace-flash, laces tucked

Accessories: Thin tactical gloves with gunmetal knuckle-lines, a low-profile wrist-tool (non-speaking), a slim ear-comm prop; nothing dangling

The Impossible Move: As she runs and slides into the laser grid, the security beams bend and part around her body — the straight crimson-cyan lasers curving into graceful arcs that peel away from her every limb like reeds in a current, opening a clean tunnel through the grid, then snapping back perfectly straight behind her. (START keyframe = Frame 3 — the first lasers begin bending away as she enters; PEAK = Frame 4 — the full grid bent into a tunnel around her; END keyframe = Frame 5 — the lasers snap back straight as she clears.)

Concept Line / Twist payoff: "Rules bend... for the ones who don't."

Duration · frames: ~23s · 6 frames

Mood: Cool, precise, razor-calm

Composition signature: Deep corridor one-point perspective — a lone figure threading a cage of light that curves to let her pass

Camera Language: High establishing drone down the corridor → low ground-tracking rig on the run → over-shoulder gimbal at the grid → FPV through the bending laser-tunnel → crane rise at the vault → mirror drone pull-up to loop

Grade / Color Script: Cool heist-noir — crimson-and-cyan laser accents, cold blue ambient, obsidian black, the bending beats glowing curved laser-light, deep uncrushed blacks, polished-floor speculars, full saturated mid-tone

Narrator VO (AR): One line, landed near Frame 5, warm natural Indian-accented female narrator (NOT Aira's mouth, never subject-speaking)

Frame-Join Continuity: Each frame's exit pose/cue = next frame's entry; the laser-bend runs continuously across Frames 3→5 (bend → tunnel → snap-back) so the run reads as one unbroken motion; Frame 6 mirrors Frame 1 for a seamless loop

Identity safety: Same Aira face/proportions every frame; modest tactical suit; adult, body-safe; no real logos/readable text

---

LIP-SYNC: None — lips composed.

FRAME-JOIN HANDOFF (LOOP): Resolves to the exact Frame 1 hook (hand on doorframe, down-corridor gaze, drone high) so Frame 6 → Frame 1 loops invisibly.

NEGATIVE: No Aira speaking, no real logos, no stutter-cut, no warped anatomy, no visible loop seam, identity flicker.

---

🎚️ MASTER TRACK BRIEF — Concept 12 (Vault Run): A cool, taut heist-thriller score built around precision and tension. Opens cold and sparse under the threshold hook (Frame 1) with a low sub-pulse, a ticking clock-percussion and a single tense synth-note; a driving stealth-pulse and a pizzicato-string ostinato enter on the sprint (Frame 2); the laser-bend beats (Frames 3–4) are scored with singing bent-glass tones and a rising tension-swell layered over the footfalls, building to a taut orchestral-and-synth PEAK as the grid bends into a tunnel; the snap-back (Frame 5) lands a crisp resolve-stab; the track ducks cleanly under the narrator VO at the vault (Frame 5 — "Rules bend... for the ones who don't."); then it resolves to a sustained tense chord at the threshold (Frame 6) for a seamless loop. Cool, precise and thrilling, tempo taut around 112–120 BPM, minor and tense with a cold electronic top. Kept under the diegetic footfall, laser-whine, bend-resonance and vault SFX — present, never a full mix. (Distinct from every other Master Track Brief in this set.)

## 🧗 CONCEPT 13 — VERTICAL CITY · The whole skyscraper rotates from vertical to horizontal so her climb becomes a flat run

Pillar / Format: Parkour / Gravity Hero / SILENT · 9:16 vertical reel · VEO 3.1 (motion) + Nano Banana Pro (stills)

Hero: Aira free-running up the glass face of a megacity skyscraper; self-aware, fluid, fully human athlete — fearless serene focus with breath-true micro-expressions and precise, weight-true parkour body-control

Setting: A colossal glass-and-steel skyscraper at golden-hour dusk over a vast megacity skyline — mirror-glass curtain wall reflecting amber clouds, far-below traffic-rivers, drifting high-altitude haze, a deep warm sky

Wardrobe (AW): A fitted slate-grey athletic parkour suit with subtle amber seam-lines, high modest collar, full-coverage stretch-armor panels, sealed and streamlined, nothing loose to snag

Hair (AP): A tight high braided bun sealed clean (climb-ready), a clean center part, a few face-framing strands free; color locked

Makeup (AQ): Clean kinetic glow — warm satin skin, soft contour, defined brow, a warm rose stained lip, inner-corner brighten; real pores

Footwear: Low-profile grippy parkour shoes with a thin high-friction sole and amber lace-flash, laces tucked

Accessories: Thin climbing gloves with chalk-dust knuckles, a low-profile climb-harness (worn modestly), a slim wrist-altimeter (non-speaking); nothing dangling

The Impossible Move: As she free-runs straight up the vertical glass face, the entire skyscraper rotates ninety degrees from vertical to horizontal — the world tilting around her so the sheer wall becomes a flat floor and her desperate climb becomes a smooth, weightless horizontal sprint along the tower toward the open sky, then the tower rotates back to vertical as she catches a hold. (START keyframe = Frame 3 — the tower begins rotating, the world tilting; PEAK = Frame 4 — full horizontal, she sprints flat along the tower; END keyframe = Frame 5 — the tower rotates back to vertical as she catches a hold.)

Concept Line / Twist payoff: (silent — no spoken or narrated line; the gravity-flip IS the payoff.)

Duration · frames: ~27s · 7 frames

Mood: Serene, vertiginous, weightless-calm

Composition signature: Dizzying vertical-to-horizontal perspective — a lone figure on a mirror-glass cliff that tips into a runway to the sky

Camera Language: High establishing drone down the tower face → low wall-tracking rig on the climb → orbit gimbal at the rotation → FPV along the horizontal run → crane at the catch → hero beat → mirror drone pull-up to loop

Grade / Color Script: Warm vertigo — amber-gold dusk, mirror-glass sky-reflections, deep cobalt shadow, the rotation beat shimmering with reorienting golden light, deep uncrushed blacks, glass speculars, full saturated mid-tone

Voice: SILENT — no subject voice, no narrator; diegetic SFX + master track only

Frame-Join Continuity: Each frame's exit pose/cue = next frame's entry; the rotation runs continuously across Frames 3→5 (tilt → horizontal → tilt-back) so the climb-to-run reads as one unbroken motion; Frame 7 mirrors Frame 1 for a seamless loop

Identity safety: Same Aira face/proportions every frame; modest parkour suit; adult, body-safe; no real logos/readable text

---

### Frame 1 of 7 — IMAGE PROMPT

IDENTITY LOCK: Aira [paste identity-lock reference sheet here].

WARDROBE: The slate-grey parkour suit with amber seam-lines and high modest collar, one warm dusk-rim sliding along the shoulder, pristine, sealed, zero snags.

HAIR: The tight high braided bun sealed clean, a clean center part, a few face-framing strands free, razor-clean hairline, color locked.

FOOTWEAR & ACCESSORIES: Low grippy parkour shoes with amber lace-flash edged on a window-mullion; thin climbing gloves with chalk-dust knuckles; climb-harness worn modestly; wrist-altimeter glowing faint.

FACIAL MICRO-DYNAMICS: Chin level, a calm fearless quarter-smile pulling the left corner a hair tighter, lips parted barely 1mm on a held breath, eyes lifting up the tower with a crisp warm sky catchlight, the faintest focused set at the outer brow.

BIOMECHANICS & WEIGHT: Poised spread against the vertical glass face, torso rotated about 8° to open the shoulder to lens, weight distributed through four points of contact, hips tucked to the wall, spine long and coiled to climb (living stillness).

PHYSICS (animated next): High-altitude haze drifting across the glass, amber clouds reflecting and sliding on the curtain wall, far-below traffic-rivers flowing, the free strands tugged by the high wind — environment alive, climber poised.

KINETIC STILLNESS (8 layers): 1) a free strand whipping at her temple in the high wind 2) amber clouds sliding across the mirror-glass 3) high-altitude haze drifting past 4) far-below traffic-rivers flowing tiny 5) chest rising on a slow shallow inhale 6) a warm specular sliding along the glass mullion 7) the suit seam catching a micro rim-shift as she breathes 8) a slow eyelash settle completing a blink.

CAMERA ANGLE: A slow high establishing DRONE easing down the tower face from far above to a clean chest-up hero level — revealing the skyscraper scale and the drop before settling on her.

LIGHTING: KEY = warm amber dusk-light keying from camera-left; FILL = soft cobalt sky-bounce off the glass lifting the under-jaw; RIM = a golden cloud-edge kissing her shoulder; PRACTICAL = the dusk sky and city glow; SEPARATION = the drop pulled deep so she reads ~2 stops up; BOUNCE = a mirror-glass kick on the suit.

FRAMING: 9:16, Aira centered lower-third, the tower face soaring into the headroom above, the drop hinted in the lower frame, vast vertical negative space to receive the climb.
SUBJECT FRAMING & POSITION: An establishing-to-hero framing holds Aira, centered lower-third, the tower face soaring into the headroom above, the drop hinted in the lower frame, vast vertical negative space to receive the climb. ### Frame 1 of 7 — VIDEO PROMPT

IDENTITY & CHARACTER-CONSISTENCY LOCK: render Aira strictly from the locked identity reference and hold her the SAME PERSON for the entire 6-second clip and every generated frame. Do not mirror, flip or invert the frame.

FRAME-JOIN HANDOFF (LOOP): Matches Frame 1 exactly — hand on the mullion, up-tower gaze, glass-face framing — so the reel loops back to Frame 1 with no visible seam.

NEGATIVE: No real logos/readable text, no extra fingers, no second face, no immodest fit, no warped anatomy, no visible loop seam.

### Frame 7 of 7 — VIDEO PROMPT (LOOP)

IDENTITY & CHARACTER-CONSISTENCY LOCK: render Aira strictly from the locked identity reference and hold her the SAME PERSON for the entire 6-second clip and every generated frame. Treat identity as a FIXED skeleton that never changes — bone structure (skull, cheekbones, jawline, chin), overall face shape and proportions, eye shape, spacing and iris colour, nose and lip shape, skin tone and real skin texture (visible pores, fine peach-fuzz; no plastic smoothing, no beautification creep, no face re-shaping), hairline, hair colour and texture, height, build and hand/finger anatomy. ONLY the soft expression muscles may move — eyelids, brows, cheeks and mouth corners — together with the eyes, gaze and head; expression and lip-sync animate ON TOP of that fixed identity and must NEVER alter the face shape, the eye colour, or who she is. Keep expression changes smooth and moderate and lead them with the EYES and GAZE (soft smiles, brow lifts, a parted breath, eyes tracing the object) — no extreme grimace, no wide-mouth distortion, no hard squint, no rapid expression flicker that would warp the geometry; favour one clean expression transition per clip. ABSOLUTE ZERO identity drift: no morphing, melting, smearing, rubbery warping, face-swapping, twinning or a second/duplicate subject, no age, weight, ethnicity or gender shift, no extra, missing or fused fingers or limbs. Identity stays identical at the first frame, every in-between frame, the loop seam and the last frame. Through any transform, impossible move or fast action ONLY the intended element (wardrobe, environment, props or effect) changes — her face, identity and proportions stay fully recognizable; interpolate strictly between the locked keyframes and never invent a new face, new hands, extra limbs or a second subject. Do not mirror, flip or invert the frame.

SHOT TYPE: Loop-close establishing; subject ~45% as the drone climbs.

DRONE / RIG NOTE: Cinema drone pull-up (hero level → high above the tower face), the mirror of Frame 1's descent.

CAMERA MOVEMENT: The drone rises and pulls back to the Frame 1 establishing position; one smooth move, no jitter.

LENS: 35mm-equiv, f/2.0.

SUBJECT ACTION — MICRO-TIMECODE:

`00:17.0–00:18.0` she resets spread on the vertical glass face, hand gripping the mullion, the composed fearless quarter-smile returning

`00:18.0–00:19.2` a held breath as the drone climbs above the tower

`00:19.2–00:20.2` the framing matches Frame 1 exactly, ready to loop

PHYSICS & MOTION: Real drifting haze and sliding cloud-reflections shifting with the drone parallax, natural strand whip — matched to Frame 1.

LIGHTING: Warm amber key, cobalt sky-bounce, golden cloud rim — matched to Frame 1.

ENVIRONMENT: The skyscraper glass face at dusk, megacity drop below, drifting high haze.

SPEED RAMP: 100% real-time.

AUDIO (diegetic + master-track button): the high-altitude wind ambience and distant city-hum bed returns (the Frame 1 bed); `00:17.4` a soft glass-creak as she resets; `00:18.0` her slow centering exhale (no word). Master-track resolves on a sustained airy chord so the reel loops with no audible seam. No VO of any kind (silent reel).

DURATION: 6.0s (running total 00:20.2 active; ~27s with handles).

FRAME RATE + MOTION BLUR: 24fps, 180° shutter, natural blur on the drone climb; real-time.

LIP-SYNC: None — lips composed.

FRAME-JOIN HANDOFF (LOOP): Resolves to the exact Frame 1 hook (hand on mullion, up-tower gaze, drone high) so Frame 7 → Frame 1 loops invisibly.

NEGATIVE: No speaking, no real logos, no stutter-cut, no warped anatomy, no visible loop seam, identity flicker.

---

🎚️ MASTER TRACK BRIEF — Concept 13 (Vertical City): A vast, soaring cinematic score built around weightless wonder and altitude. Opens airy and suspended under the glass-face hook (Frame 1) with a high sustained string-pad, a distant choir-hush and a low sub-drone; a rising arpeggiated build and a heartbeat-pulse enter on the climb (Frame 2); the rotation beats (Frames 3–4) are scored with a swelling brass-and-string lift and a glassy shimmer as the world turns, building to a transcendent orchestral PEAK as she sprints the horizontal runway to the sky; the rotate-back catch (Frame 5) lands a warm resolving swell; it eases through the silent hero beat at the high hold (Frame 6); then it resolves to a sustained airy chord at the glass face (Frame 7) for a seamless loop. Vast, serene and triumphant, tempo broad around 80–88 BPM, major-lifting with an airy cinematic top. Kept under the diegetic high-wind, glass-creak, footfall and world-rotation SFX — present, never a full mix, and with no vocals of any kind (silent reel). (Distinct from every other Master Track Brief in this set.)

---

## 🌧️ CONCEPT 14 — ALLEY STANDOFF · The pouring rain freezes mid-air and she walks calmly through the suspended storm

Pillar / Format: Noir / Time-Control Hero / VO · 9:16 vertical reel · VEO 3.1 (motion) + Nano Banana Pro (stills)

Hero: Aira walking through a rain-soaked neon back-alley at night; self-aware, fluid, fully human — cool unshakeable composure with breath-true micro-expressions and a slow, deliberate, weight-true walk

Setting: A narrow rain-soaked neon back-alley at night — wet cobblestones, dense vertical rain, glowing magenta-cyan-amber signage, steam curling from street grates, puddles mirroring the neon, deep wet blacks

Wardrobe (AW): A fitted weatherproof charcoal long-coat over a modest high-collar tactical layer, full-coverage, sealed, belted at the waist, nothing loose or revealing

Hair (AP): A sleek low wet-look bun, a clean center part, a few rain-damp face-framing strands; color locked

Makeup (AQ): Clean kinetic glow with a wet sheen — neutral satin skin, soft contour, defined brow, a deep wine stained lip, inner-corner brighten; real pores

Footwear: Low-profile black weatherproof boots with a grippy sole and gunmetal lace-flash, laces tucked

Accessories: Thin weatherproof gloves, a low-profile collar-comm (non-speaking), a slim wrist-piece; nothing dangling

The Impossible Move: As she strides into the downpour, the pouring rain freezes and suspends mid-air — millions of falling droplets stopping dead, hanging motionless as glittering neon-lit beads filling the alley, and she walks calmly straight through the frozen storm, the droplets parting in a clean corridor around her body, then time resumes and the rain crashes back down behind her. (START keyframe = Frame 3 — the rain begins freezing and suspending mid-air; PEAK = Frame 4 — the full frozen rain-field, she walks through; END keyframe = Frame 5 — the rain resumes crashing down behind her.)

Concept Line / Twist payoff: "Even the rain learns to wait."

Duration · frames: ~22s · 6 frames

Mood: Cool, unshakeable, noir-calm

Composition signature: Deep alley one-point perspective — a lone figure walking through a frozen curtain of glittering rain

Camera Language: High establishing drone down the alley → low ground-tracking rig on the walk → orbit gimbal at the freeze → FPV through the suspended rain → crane rise at the resume → mirror drone pull-up to loop

Grade / Color Script: Neon-noir rain — magenta-cyan-amber signage, wet blacks, the frozen rain glittering with suspended neon-lit beads, deep uncrushed blacks, puddle speculars, full saturated mid-tone

Narrator VO (AR): One line, landed near Frame 5, warm natural Indian-accented female narrator (NOT Aira's mouth, never subject-speaking)

Frame-Join Continuity: Each frame's exit pose/cue = next frame's entry; the freeze runs continuously across Frames 3→5 (freeze → walk-through → resume) so the walk reads as one unbroken motion; Frame 6 mirrors Frame 1 for a seamless loop

Identity safety: Same Aira face/proportions every frame; modest long-coat; adult, body-safe; no real logos/readable signage text

---

### Frame 1 of 6 — IMAGE PROMPT

IDENTITY LOCK: Aira [paste identity-lock reference sheet here].

WARDROBE: The charcoal weatherproof long-coat over the modest high-collar layer, belted, one cool magenta neon-rim sliding along the shoulder, pristine, sealed, zero snags.

HAIR: The sleek low wet-look bun, a clean center part, a few rain-damp face-framing strands, razor-clean hairline, color locked.

MAKEUP: Clean kinetic glow with a wet sheen — neutral satin skin, soft contour, defined brow, deep wine stained lip with one wet light-point, inner-corner brighten; real pores.

FOOTWEAR & ACCESSORIES: Low weatherproof boots with gunmetal lace-flash on the wet cobbles; thin weatherproof gloves; collar-comm glinting; wrist-piece glowing faint.

HANDS & NAILS: One gloved hand loose at her side, the other resting at the coat-belt, fingertips light, no tension; natural poised, ready stance.

FACIAL MICRO-DYNAMICS: Chin level, a calm unshakeable quarter-smile pulling the left corner a hair tighter, lips parted barely 1mm on a held breath, eyes direct down the rainy alley with a crisp twin neon catchlight, the faintest focused set at the outer brow.

BIOMECHANICS & WEIGHT: Poised at the alley mouth, torso rotated about 8° to open the shoulder to lens, weight settled and balanced ready to step, front shoulder dropped, spine long and calm (living stillness).

PHYSICS (animated next): Dense vertical rain pouring, steam curling from a grate, neon signage flickering, puddles rippling under the rain, the damp strands stirring — environment alive, she poised.

KINETIC STILLNESS (8 layers): 1) a damp strand stirring at her temple 2) dense rain pouring past her 3) steam curling from a street grate 4) a neon sign flickering soft 5) chest rising on a slow shallow inhale 6) a magenta specular sliding along the wet coat 7) puddles rippling under the rain at her feet 8) a slow eyelash settle completing a blink.

SPATIAL LOGIC: FG = the wet cobbles and a puddle nearest lens at ~20% depth, tack sharp; MG = Aira at the alley mouth, the hero; BG = the rainy neon alley funnelling deep, clean separation, glowing one-point perspective.

CAMERA ANGLE: A slow high establishing DRONE easing down the alley from above the mouth to a clean chest-up hero level — revealing the rainy neon corridor before settling on her.

LIGHTING: KEY = cool magenta neon keying from camera-left; FILL = soft cyan puddle-bounce lifting the under-jaw; RIM = an amber sign-glow kissing her shoulder; PRACTICAL = the neon signage and puddle reflections; SEPARATION = the alley pulled deep so she reads ~2 stops up; BOUNCE = a wet-cobble kick on the coat.

FRAMING: 9:16, Aira centered lower-third, the rainy alley headroom above, the puddle in the lower frame, deep negative space to receive the walk.
SUBJECT FRAMING & POSITION: An establishing-to-hero framing holds Aira, centered lower-third, the rainy alley headroom above, the puddle in the lower frame, deep negative space to receive the walk. She is poised at the alley mouth, torso rotated about 8° to open the shoulder to lens, weight settled and balanced ready to step, front shoulder dropped, spine long and calm. The camera holds a mid distance, Aira the sharp central figure of the Alley Standoff beat, with the action arcing the upper frame above her. She faces front to the lens. Her pose reads as poised at the alley mouth, torso rotated about 8° to open the shoulder to lens, weight settled and balanced ready to step, front shoulder dropped, spine long and calm (living stillness) — gaze fixed and precise on her next point, focused; head level and still for balance; both shoulders open and level, micro-adjusting; the RIGHT arm extended for counter-balance while the LEFT arm reaches out to steady the line; torso tall and poised over the narrow base, core engaged; waist long, hips stacked precisely over the support; the RIGHT support leg bearing the weight with a soft knee while the LEFT extends to balance; both feet precise on the narrow footing, weight pinpoint and controlled; hair settling with the held poise. ORIENTATION LOCK — preserve this exact left-to-right composition; do not mirror, flip or invert the frame.

LENS + DOF + BOKEH: 35mm-equiv, f/2.0, shallow — the neon alley melting to creamy magenta-cyan bokeh with rain-bokeh sparkles, Aira tack-sharp.

COMPOSITION REFERENCE: A neon-noir hero still — a lone figure at the mouth of a rainy alley, scroll-stopping.

ATMOSPHERE: Cool, unshakeable, charged — the hush of a held breath before the walk.

COLOR GRADE: Neon-noir rain — magenta-cyan-amber signage, wet blacks, deep uncrushed blacks, puddle speculars, full mid-tone, no murk.

TEXTURE & MICRO-DETAIL: The weatherproof coat reads as real wet technical fabric, the cobbles read true wet stone, rain reads as real falling droplets, soft peach-fuzz catches the rim at her jaw, steam drifts authentically.

FRAME-JOIN HANDOFF: Ends locked on her hand at the belt and the calm down-alley gaze — Frame 2 opens on that first deliberate step forward into the rain.

NEGATIVE: No real logos/readable signage text, no extra fingers, no second face, no immodest fit, no warped anatomy, no floating shadows, plastic skin, oversharpened, watermarks.
